findings.evidence: `rg -n "normalizerQuotientLift|subgroupOf|normalizerQuotientLift_injective_iff" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean` shows the lift signature at lines 103-107 and the injectivity iff at lines 139-145 both expose `H.subgroupOf (_root_.Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G))`.
findings.fix: Add or change to a user-facing lift whose hypothesis is stated in ambient terms, e.g. `∀ g : Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G), (g : G) ∈ H → φ g = 1`, with the existing subgroupOf version private or secondary; similarly expose the injectivity criterion as `∀ g, φ g = 1 ↔ (g : G) ∈ H`.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientLift` still requires `H.subgroupOf (Subgroup.normalizer (H : Set G)) ≤ φ.ker`, so users must mention the implementation copy of `H` inside the normalizer to use the universal property.

summary: The named lift was added, but its public contract still exposes the implementation subgroup instead of the ambient condition users need for the normalizer quotient API.
